briefdescription.para: Find property metadata by name.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the property to find.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the BProperty if found, otherwise nullptr.

briefdescription.para: Check whether a property with the given name exists.
Iterate over all properties (const).
Iterate over all properties (mutable).
Get a reference to a property value on a raw instance pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the object instance memory.
if the property is not found.

briefdescription.para: Const overload of GetValueRef for read-only access.
Access the list of properties for this class.
Get the number of reflected properties.
Check whether a metadata key exists for this class.
Get a metadata value by key if present.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t id, BFunction::ThunkFn thunk, std::initializer_list< BFunctionMeta > metaList={}, std::initializer_list< BFunctionParam > paramsList={})
memberdef.name: AddFunction

briefdescription.para: Register a reflected function for this class.

parameterdescription.para: Hashed id of the function name.
Invocation wrapper used to call the function.

briefdescription.para: Find a reflected function by hashed id.
Const overload of FindFunction.
Invoke a reflected function by id on the provided instance.

parameterdescription.para: Hashed id of the function to invoke.

simplesect.para: true if invocation was performed, false otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *instance, const std::string &name, Variant *args=nullptr, size_t argCount=0) const
memberdef.name: InvokeByName

briefdescription.para: Convenience invocation by function name (hashed at runtime).
Access reflected function list.
Get the number of reflected functions.

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *propName, const char *typeName, std::size_t offset, std::size_t size, BTypeId typeId, std::initializer_list< BPropertyMeta > metas={})
memberdef.name: AddPropertyOffset

briefdescription.para: Add a property description by offset into the instance.

parameterdescription.para: Size in bytes of the property.

briefdescription.para: Add a key/value metadata pair to this class.
Runtime reflection data for a C++ type registered with the engine.

detaileddescription.para: Stores function and property reflection metadata and various lifecycle callbacks that may be used by systems such as the ECS lifecycle.
